'''ngayuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plagioclase|plagioclase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plagioclase|plagioclase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngayuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæyijith|ngæyijith]] || [[word:ngæyijij|ngæyijij]] || [[word:ngæyijish|ngæyijish]] || [[word:ngæyiji|ngæyiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayuyujuth|ngayuyujuth]] || [[word:ngayuyujuj|ngayuyujuj]] || [[word:ngayuyujush|ngayuyujush]] || [[word:ngayuyuju|ngayuyuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayujuth|ngayujuth]] || [[word:ngayujuj|ngayujuj]] || [[word:ngayujush|ngayujush]] || [[word:ngayuju|ngayuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayufjuth|ngayufjuth]] || [[word:ngayufjuj|ngayufjuj]] || [[word:ngayufjush|ngayufjush]] || [[word:ngayufjuf|ngayufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngayujuthu|ngayujuthu]] || [[word:ngayujuju|ngayujuju]] || [[word:ngayujushu|ngayujushu]] || [[word:ngayujuku|ngayujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngayujuth|ngayujuth]] || [[word:ngayujuj|ngayujuj]] || [[word:ngayujush|ngayujush]] || [[word:ngayuju|ngayuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngayujuthul|ngayujuthul]] || [[word:ngayujujul|ngayujujul]] || [[word:ngayujushul|ngayujushul]] || [[word:ngayujukul|ngayujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngayujuthuthu|ngayujuthuthu]] || [[word:ngayujujuju|ngayujujuju]] || [[word:ngayujushushu|ngayujushushu]] || [[word:ngayujuku|ngayujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngayujuthun|ngayujuthun]] || [[word:ngayujujun|ngayujujun]] || [[word:ngayujushun|ngayujushun]] || [[word:ngayujukun|ngayujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngayujuthuoro|ngayujuthuoro]] || [[word:ngayujujuoro|ngayujujuoro]] || [[word:ngayujushuoro|ngayujushuoro]] || [[word:ngayujukuoro|ngayujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
